entries.author: QualityControled

entries.author: sinceohsix
entries.excerpt: The game boots and you can get into the main game as expected. Video content (e.g. pre-rendered cutscenes and intro sequences) have heavy graphical glitches during playback. Career mode crashes after character creation, but Freeskate works as expected. There is also an issue related to, what I think is, the physics with the skaters hair.

entries.author: sinceohsix
entries.excerpt: The game boots and you can get into the main game as expected. Video content (e.g. pre-rendered cutscenes and intro sequences) have heavy graphical glitches during playback. There is also an issue related to, what I think is, the physics with the skaters hair.

entries.author: QualityControled

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: There are shadow errors, some minor rendering issues in cutscenes and gameplay, and it runs at a very poor refresh rate, but it is playable.

entries.author: QualityControled

entries.author: sinceohsix
entries.excerpt:
Audio in the intro sequence is heavily distorted and ear-piercingly loud, please be careful when opening the game.

Like some other games, there are heavy graphical errors during intro sequences as well as during loading screens. The game froze quite a few times on the main menu before I was able to get into actual gameplay. During gameplay, performance is a *bit* sluggish with noticeable stutters here and there. The game performs much better in smaller areas and in HORDE mode from my testing. There are graphical glitches with the lighting and shadows, especially when paused.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt:
If loading into game with classic graphics, runs at a steady 30fps. In anniversary mode there are severe graphical issues. When switching back from anniversary to classic mid game this breaks rendering in classic. 

Additionally, the game shows audio issues in the warthog and some covenant vehicles.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game runs at 15-20fps on iPhone 17. No noticeable graphical issues. Runs in slow motion due to engine expecting 60fps.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Runs around 10-15fps on iPhone 17. Has severe audio issues. Graphically looks perfect in the first mission at least.

entries.author: xenios-jp

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Loads into firefight but extreme graphical issues to the point that the game is unplayable.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: When the game finishes launching past the Developer credits and the intro movie starts the visuals of the movie have a Matrix-effect, when you hear the audio start Press Start or A to get to the main start menu. The audio effects and music in the game play well. Some in game graphics have a rainbow psychedelic coloration effect over them, it seems to occur when a transparent filter is applied over the in game characters and objects, such as looking through a window or when the in game lighting is in day time. The Game plays slower than the original speed but is still very playable.

-Graphics: minor glitches like hair transparency

-Sound: No sound…

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt:
- XeniOS is inside of LiveContainer nightly with universal.js as its script and it boots up the App Store version of StikDebug (the App Store version launches JIT for other apps just fine)
- The PiP window almost never shows up
- Halo 3 usually opens into a black screen but sometimes the entire app just closes instantly
- I have all modern scripts in the scripts folder of the App Store version of StikDebug
